title: Beyond Bedrock
description: The mod that adds all the ores for all of my mods. it also will make equipment for a bunch of ores vanilla that doesn't have any
body:
This mod adds a few things:
## Ultimatium
Ultimatium Ore generates in the end rarely, more typically on the bottom of end islands 
Ultimatium tools and armor is expensive but provides large buffs over netherite
## Copper
this mod adds copper armor and tools
